name: jarvisos
description: JarvisOS — local offline AI assistant for macOS

scripts.build: npm run build -w @jarvisos/tools && npm run build -w @jarvisos/memory && npm run build -w @jarvisos/agent && npm run build -w @jarvisos/documents && npm run build -w @jarvisos/voice && npm run build -w @jarvisos/backend && npm run build -w @jarvisos/frontend
scripts.build:core: npm run build -w @jarvisos/tools && npm run build -w @jarvisos/memory && npm run build -w @jarvisos/agent && npm run build -w @jarvisos/backend
scripts.typecheck: npm run build:core && npm run typecheck --workspaces --if-present
scripts.dev: node scripts/dev-urls.mjs && concurrently -n api,ui -c blue,green "npm run dev -w @jarvisos/backend" "npm run dev -w @jarvisos/frontend"
